prompt: Fix Ethernet RX debugging and move VVRP MAC ownership to ETHERNET
note: Removed the independent Npcap debug listener and attached debugging to real Ethernet RX/TX paths. Configured MAC state is now owned by ETHERNET; runtime snapshots use the effective ETHERNET MAC while host MAC stays at the DPlane boundary.
decisions: Keep the debugging ethernet command family and implementation entirely in ETHERNET; CMD only registers the module commands.
